auth.headline: Secure messaging for anyone, anywhere (shn)
auth.description: End-to-end encryption, translation to 100+ languages, disappearing messages, and voice/video calling. (shn)

hero.line1: Secure messaging for anyone, anywhere — with (shn)
hero.sub: Get a free secure phone number to call and text worldwide over Wi-Fi or data. Enjoy end-to-end encryption, disappearing messages, and HD voice/video calling — with built-in tools that help you stay connected across borders. (shn)
hero.freeNote: Basic calling and texting are free. Advanced AI and premium features require an upgrade. (shn)

feat.translate: Break language barriers in your conversations (shn)

profile.callTextForwardingDescription: Forward incoming calls and texts to your verified phone or email. Outgoing calls/texts can show your Chatforia number. (shn)

profile.errQuietHours: Quiet hours must be between 0 and 23. (shn)

profile.teenMatchingNote: For safety, accounts in the 13–17 age range can only be matched with other 13–17 accounts in Random Chat. (shn)
profile.foriaRemember: Let Ria remember things you tell it (shn)
profile.foriaRememberDesc: When this is on, Foria can use your past Random Chat conversations (just with you) to keep the conversation flowing. You can turn this off any time. (shn)

profile.portHint: Want to keep your current number? You can port it into Chatforia Wireless. (shn)

upgrade.title: Upgrade (shn)
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium. (shn)
upgrade.subtitle: Choose an app plan, add data packs for yourself, or share data with your family — all from one place. (shn)
upgrade.subtitle.app: Start with our free, ad-supported plan. Go ad-free with Plus, or unlock full power features with Premium. (shn)
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Add global eSIM data so Chatforia keeps working even when you’re away from Wi-Fi. (shn)
upgrade.subtitle.family: Create a shared data pool for your family and manage everyone’s usage from one place. (shn)

free.title: Free (shn)
free.desc: Start messaging for free. Ideal if you’re just trying Chatforia. (shn)

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 and group chat, plus voice and video calls (shn)
features.media: Share photos, voice messages, and short videos (shn)
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies and instant translation (fair use) (shn)
features.disappearing: Disappearing messages and basic privacy controls (shn)
features.ads: Free forever with ads in the app (shn)

plus.title: Plus (shn)
plus.desc: All the essentials, without ads. Great for everyday messaging and calling. (shn)

features.allFree: Everything in Free, with no ads (shn)
features.forwarding: Forward calls and texts to your real phone number (shn)
features.support: Faster support when something goes wrong (shn)

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Monthly) (shn)
premiumMonthly.desc: The full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, and priority support. (shn)

features.themes: Unlock all premium color themes and app customizations (shn)
features.ai: Premium-only AI power tools for rewrites, smart replies, and summaries (shn)
features.support: Priority support when you need help most (shn)

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Annual) (shn)
premiumAnnual.desc: Save more when billed yearly — including extra color themes, AI tools, and priority support. (shn)

features.allPremium: Everything in Premium Monthly — including extra color themes (shn)
features.save25: Save around 30% compared to paying monthly (shn)
features.bestFor: Best for power users, remote workers, and heavy travelers (shn)

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Save 30% with annual – continue to login (shn)
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees. (shn)

marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, and AI power tools. (shn)
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Billed upfront. Cancel anytime. No hidden fees. (shn)

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs) (shn)
mobile.subtitle: Add global data to keep Chatforia working even without Wi-Fi. Prices automatically adjust based on your country and currency. (shn)
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick a one-time global data pack so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling or away from Wi-Fi. (shn)
mobile.note: We don’t sell data packs under 3 GB. (shn)

features.throttle: Speeds may slow after high usage (shn)

disclaimer.devices: eSIM data packs require an eSIM-compatible and unlocked device. Availability varies by phone model, carrier, and country. Coverage and speeds vary by region. (shn)

small.title: Starter pack (shn)
small.desc: Includes 3 GB of high-speed data — ideal for light messaging and occasional calls. (shn)
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, and occasional calls (shn)

medium.title: Traveler pack (shn)
medium.desc: Includes 5 GB of high-speed data for trips, commuting, and regular VoIP calls. (shn)
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, and maps (shn)

large.title: Power pack (shn)
large.desc: Includes 10 GB of high-speed data for heavy chat, calls, and video on the Chatforia network. (shn)
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, calls, video, and hotspot use (shn)
large.aria: Buy Power user eSIM data pack (shn)

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs (shn)
compare.disclaimer: Actual data usage depends on how you use Chatforia (voice, video, media, and other apps on your phone). (shn)

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data) (shn)
family.subtitle: Share a single data pool across your family. One bill, multiple Chatforia accounts, global coverage. (shn)

small.title: Family Small (shn)
small.desc: Includes 20 GB of shared high-speed data — great for 2–3 light users. (shn)

medium.title: Family Medium (shn)
medium.desc: Includes 40 GB of shared high-speed data — ideal for 3–5 active members. (shn)

large.title: Family Large (shn)
large.desc: Includes 80 GB of shared high-speed data — for power families that are always online. (shn)

feature.shared: Shared data pool for your family (shn)
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use policy and local limits (shn)

family.disclaimer: Family packs create or top up a shared data pool. You can invite and remove members anytime. (shn)
family.footnote: Family packs share a single data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Availability and limits depend on your country and local regulations. (shn)

why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia (shn)
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready. (shn)

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow (shn)
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer. (shn)

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice (shn)
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding. (shn)

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps (shn)
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe. (shn)

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow. (shn)

free.q: Is the Free plan really free? (shn)
free.a: Yes. The Free plan includes a Chatforia number, calling, and messaging with ads. You can stay on Free as long as you like, or upgrade to remove ads and unlock more features. (shn)

plusPremium.q: What’s the difference between Plus and Premium? (shn)
plusPremium.a: Plus removes ads and extends your message history — perfect for everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools for rewrites and replies, and priority support for heavy users. (shn)

esim.q: Where do eSIM data packs work? (shn)
esim.a: Chatforia Mobile uses global eSIM coverage. Availability depends on your country and device. You’ll see supported options during activation inside the app. (shn)

cancel.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime? (shn)
cancel.a: Yes. You can manage or cancel your subscription from the billing page in the app. Changes take effect at the end of your current billing period. (shn)

family.a: Family packs create a shared data pool across multiple Chatforia accounts. One person pays the bill, and you can invite or remove members and set limits per person. (shn)

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started (shn)
gettingStarted.subtitle: New to Chatforia? This quick start shows the essentials so you can be productive in minutes. (shn)

alert.text: This guide will grow as we launch new features. If something’s missing, let us know via (shn)

section2.title: 2) Start messaging (shn)
section2.item1: Create a DM or Group and send your first message. (shn)
section2.item2: Use instant translation to chat across 100+ languages. (shn)
section2.item3: Try disappearing messages and read receipts in Profile → Privacy. (shn)

section3.title: 3) Go further (shn)
section3.item1: You can upgrade to a paid plan anytime inside the app. (shn)
section3.item2: Once you’re signed in, you can link additional devices and set up encrypted backups from Settings in the app. (shn)

account.q: How do I create or recover my account? (shn)
account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”. (shn)

privacy.a: Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them. (shn)

translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata. (shn)

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version. (shn)

contact.title: Contact Us (shn)
contact.successMsg: Thanks—our team will reply by email. (shn)
contact.errorSend: Could not send. Please email support@chatforia.com. (shn)

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access. (shn)

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect (shn)
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account. (shn)
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it. (shn)
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance. (shn)

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS (shn)
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing. (shn)
sms.addRecipient: Add a recipient above to start… (shn)

howWeUse.title: How we use information (shn)
howWeUse.provide: Provide and secure the service (auth, spam/abuse detection). (shn)

sharing.title: Sharing (shn)
sharing.body: We don’t sell personal data. We may share limited data with processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) under strict contracts. (shn)

rights.title: Your rights (shn)
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com. (shn)

retention.title: Data retention & security (shn)
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us. (shn)

children.title: Children (shn)
children.body: Chatforia isn’t directed to children under 13 (or as required by your local law). (shn)

changes.title: Changes (shn)
changes.body: We’ll post updates here and revise the “Last updated” date. (shn)

contact.title: Contact (shn)
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA (shn)

intro.body: By using Chatforia you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, don’t use the service. (shn)

accounts.title: Accounts (shn)
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide accurate info and keep credentials secure. (shn)
accounts.itemResponsibility: You’re responsible for activity on your account. (shn)

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use (shn)
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: No illegal, abusive, or infringing content; no spam or automated abuse. (shn)

sms.title: SMS communications (shn)
sms.body: If you provide a mobile phone number, you agree that Chatforia may send you SMS messages related to your account and use of the service, such as login alerts, security notifications, and messages related to conversations you initiate or participate in. We do not use SMS for promotional or marketing messages without your explicit consent. Standard message and data rates may apply. You can opt out of SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (for example, “STOP”) or by updating your notification settings in the app. (shn)

yourContent.title: Your content (shn)
yourContent.body: You retain rights to your content. You grant us necessary rights to operate the service (e.g., routing, storage, translation). (shn)

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability (shn)
disclaimer.body: Service is provided “as is” without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, Chatforia isn’t liable for indirect or consequential damages. (shn)

changes.title: Changes (shn)
changes.body: We may update these terms; continued use after changes means acceptance. (shn)

contact.title: Contact (shn)
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA (shn)

doNotSell.title: Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information (shn)
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does not sell personal information. California residents can still submit requests under CPRA using the button below. (shn)

cookies.title: Cookie Settings (shn)
cookies.body: Chatforia uses minimal cookies (e.g., session, security). We don’t use third-party ads cookies. Manage cookies via your browser’s settings. (shn)

randomChat.title: Random Chat (shn)
randomChat.description: 'Meet someone new instantly'. 'We’ll match you and open a temporary chat room.' 'Chat anonymously first. Add Friend later if it feels right.' (shn)
randomChat.saveGuard: Only human-to-human chats can be saved (shn)
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: We only store an age range (not your exact date of birth). This is used to keep Random Chat pairings reasonable. To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat. (shn)
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people. (shn)
randomChat.ageBandCallout: To match with people (not just RiaBot), set your age band in Settings → Age & Random Chat. (shn)
randomChat.subtitle: Meet someone new instantly, or choose to chat with Ria. (shn)
randomChat.setAge: Set your age range in Profile → Age & Random Chat to be matched with people. (shn)

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. What’s on your mind? (shn)

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 I’m here. What’s on your mind? (shn)
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 What would you like to talk about today? (shn)
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m all ears — what’s up? (shn)
greetings.long4: Nice to see you, {{name}} 👋 What’s on your mind today? (shn)
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, or just chat? (shn)
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would you like to talk about? (shn)
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, I’m still here. What’s up? (shn)
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else you wanted to add? (shn)
greetings.short3: Back again, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me what’s on your mind. (shn)
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where we left off? (shn)
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got something new on your mind? (shn)

login.title: Continue to Chatforia (shn)
login.subtitleReturning: Log in to your Chatforia account (shn)
login.subtitle: Log in to your Chatforia account (shn)

forgot.title: Forgot Password (shn)
forgot.helper: Enter the email you used to create your Chatforia account and we'll send you a secure link to reset your password. (shn)
forgot.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address. (shn)
forgot.genericError: Unable to process request. Please try again in a moment. (shn)
forgot.sentHelper: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link. It may take a few minutes to arrive. Be sure to check your spam or promotions folder. (shn)

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on is currently unavailable. Use username & password instead. (shn)

error.unprocessable: Invalid request. Check your username/email and password. (shn)
error.deviceLimit: Device limit reached for the Free plan. Log out on another device or upgrade to Premium to link more devices. (shn)
error.premiumRequired: This action requires a Premium plan. (shn)

dialer.title: Calls (shn)
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & recents. (If you don’t use PSTN, start calls from a conversation header.) (shn)

video.title: Video (shn)
video.roomsDesc: Multi-party video using a shared room name. (shn)
video.roomsIntro: Join or create a multi-party room. (shn)
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: you can deep link directly to /video?room=room-name. (shn)

direct.title: Direct Video (shn)
direct.subtitle: Start a 1:1 video call using a phone number or Chatforia username. (shn)
direct.tipInvite: Tip: Paste a number and call without saving a contact. We’ll invite non-users by link. (shn)

rooms.title: Rooms (shn)
rooms.subtitle: Create a room or join an existing one by typing the same name. (shn)
rooms.desc: Multi-party video using a shared room name. (shn)
rooms.tip: Tip: share this name with others, or deep link to /video?room=room-name. (shn)

phoneWarning.title: Your number is expiring soon (shn)
phoneWarning.body: Your number {{number}} will be released on {{date}} unless reactivated. (shn)

support.heading: How can we help? (shn)
support.contactIntro: We’ll email you a response. Include details to help us reproduce the issue. (shn)
support.sent: Message sent. We’ll reply by email. (shn)
support.sendError: Could not send. Email support@chatforia.com instead. (shn)

account.q: How do I create or recover my account? (shn)
account.a: Download the app or use web, tap “Create account”, verify your email/phone. To recover, use “Forgot password”. (shn)

privacy.a: Yes. Messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted by default. Only you and the recipient can read them. (shn)

translate.a: Enable “Auto-translate” in Settings → Appearance & Language. We translate on-device where supported, otherwise through secure APIs with minimal metadata. (shn)

contact.a: Reach us at support@chatforia.com. Include screenshots and your app version. (shn)

encryptionRecovery.title: Manage Encryption (shn)
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, restore, unlock, or reset your encryption key. (shn)

alert.keyRequiredBody: This browser cannot currently decrypt your encrypted messages. Restore, unlock, or reset your key to continue. (shn)

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (current device) (shn)
unlockPasscode.description: Used to decrypt your keys locally before exporting (shn)

backupPassword.label: Backup password (shn)
backupPassword.description: Used to encrypt the backup file (shn)

restoreBackupPassword.label: Backup password (shn)
restoreBackupPassword.description: The password you created when backing up your key on iPhone (shn)

newLocalPasscode.label: New local passcode (shn)
newLocalPasscode.description: Protect keys at rest on this browser (shn)

resetLocalPasscode.label: New local passcode (shn)
resetLocalPasscode.description: Required before resetting so the new key is protected on this device (shn)

errors.restoreIncomplete: Key restore incomplete or incorrect for this account (shn)
errors.noBackup: No encrypted backup exists for this account (shn)
errors.missingPublicKey: Backup is missing a public key (shn)
errors.noServerPublicKey: This account does not currently expose a server public key (shn)
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server backup does not match the current account encryption key (shn)
errors.resetIncomplete: Encryption reset did not complete correctly (shn)

confirm.reset:
Reset encryption for this account?

Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later. (shn)

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: This generates a new encryption key for your account. Older encrypted messages may become unreadable unless you restore the original key later. (shn)

press.title: Press (shn)
press.contactLine: For media inquiries, reach us at (shn)
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is a privacy-first messaging app that makes cross-language chat effortless. Messages are end-to-end encrypted by default, and built-in translation supports 100+ languages in real time. Users can enable disappearing messages, keep read receipts optional, and sync across devices. Available on iOS, Android, and the web. (shn)
press.scanTip: On desktop? Scan with your phone to get the app. (shn)

careers.title: Careers (shn)
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you. (shn)
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM). (shn)
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links. (shn)
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales. (shn)

about.title: About Chatforia (shn)
about.description: Chatforia is a secure, multilingual messenger with end-to-end encryption, instant translation, and voice/video calling. Our mission is simple: help people connect—safely, privately, and across languages. (shn)

values.control: Control: Disappearing messages & read receipts are optional. (shn)
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional. (shn)

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see. (shn)

advertise.title: Advertise with Chatforia (shn)
advertise.description: Reach engaged messaging users with tasteful, brand-safe placements. We offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, and house promos. Premium subscribers do not see ads. (shn)

adsense.withPubIdShort: We also serve inventory via Google AdSense. You can target Chatforia with publisher ID {{pubId}}, or use the form below for direct sponsorships. (shn)
adsense.noPubIdShort: We also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are available—use the form below. (shn)

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing our ad inventory. Tell us about your campaign and we’ll recommend placements. (shn)

why.highSession: High session frequency and dwell time in chat UI (shn)
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Start a Chat” modal) available (shn)
why.deals: Direct deals or programmatic via AdSense/Google Ads (shn)

form.submittedMsg: Thanks! Your inquiry is on its way. We’ll follow up shortly. (shn)
form.missingRequired: Please fill in name, email, and message. (shn)
form.successToast: Thanks! We’ll be in touch soon. (shn)
form.mailtoInfo: Opening your email client to send the inquiry… (shn)

legal.disclaimerStart: By submitting, you agree to our (shn)
